ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISCHANGED( StageName ),
Probability > 0.6,
OR( Account.KYC_indicator__c = '⛔', Account.KYC_indicator__c = '🔴' )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Account was flagged by Legal and can not be worked further on. Please don’t proceed with the deal / quote until Legal team will clear this Account. You will get an email with the updated status
